name: Vague: deploy a model for inference
description: User gives a vague request for serving a model — agent must discover GPUs and set up everything.
user_intent: I want to serve a machine learning model as an API. I need a GPU with at least 24GB VRAM. Use the runpod/pytorch:2.1.0 image. Name it rpcli-eval-vague-ep. Set it to scale between 0 and 3 workers.
expected_outcome: Agent discovers available GPUs with 24GB+ VRAM, picks an appropriate GPU ID, and creates the endpoint with the correct worker scaling. The endpoint is created successfully.
